metadata.subject: IGCSE Biology (0610)
metadata.description: 40 IGCSE Biology MCQs from June 2024 Paper 11
metadata.accuracy: 40 answers verified from official mark schemes

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Which process do living organisms use to remove excess carbon dioxide from their bodies?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The photograph shows an elephant hawk-moth. Using the features visible in the photograph, to which group of arthropods does the elephant hawk-moth belong?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What does the term species mean?
options: a group of animals that reproduce asexually
a group of organisms that can reproduce to produce fertile offspring
all the plants that live in the same area at the same time
a group of vertebrates that reproduce sexually 3

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The image shows an animal. The length of the animal in the image is 36 mm. The actual length of the animal is 12 mm. What is the magnification of the image? A ×0.3 B ×3 C ×43.2 D ×432

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The diagram shows a plant cell. Which features show that it is a plant cell?
options: It has a cell wall and a vacuole.
It has a nucleus and cytoplasm.
It has a nucleus but no chloroplasts.
It has chloroplasts but no vacuole. [Turn over 4

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: A scientist investigates the effect of two types of antibiotics on bacteria. The table shows the results. type of antibiotic effect on bacteria penicillin cells burst tetracycline stops protein synthesis Which cell structure does each antibiotic affect? A Penicillin affects the cell wall and tetracycline affects the ribosomes. B Penicillin affects the nucleus and tetracycline affects the cytoplasm. C Penicillin affects the ribosomes and tetracycline affects the cell wall. D Penicillin affects the vacuole and tetracycline affects the nucleus. 5

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The diagram shows a section through an alveolus and through a capillary. wall of the alveolus air red capillary blood cells wall capillary X Y NOT TO low carbon dioxide SCALE concentration high carbon dioxide concentration How does carbon dioxide move from Y to X?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: In which row will the diffusion of ions into a cell be the quickest? ion concentration ion concentration surface area of width of in the external in the cell the cell thecellmembrane solution

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Large biological molecules are made of smaller molecules. Which row correctly matches the large molecule with the smaller molecules? large molecule smaller molecules

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: A student tests a solution for protein. Which row shows the correct food test and a positive result? colour seen with a name of test positive result A Benedict’s test blue-black B Benedict’s test purple C biuret test blue-black D biuret test purple

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What is a correct statement about enzymes?
options: The pH has no effect on the rate of reaction.
They are denatured at low temperatures.
They are made of carbohydrates which have specific shapes.

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Which statement about enzyme action is correct?
options: The shape of the enzyme’s active site is complementary to all proteins.
The shape of the enzyme’s active site is complementary to the substrate.
The shape of the substrate’s active site is complementary to the product.
The shape of the substrate’s active site is complementary to the enzyme. 7

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The graph shows the results of an experiment that investigated the effect of light intensity on the rate of photosynthesis. y-axis x-axis What are the labels for the x-axis and the y-axis? x-axis y-axis
options: light intensity rate of oxygen production
light intensity rate of carbon dioxide production
rate of carbon light intensity dioxide production
rate of oxygen light intensity production [Turn over 8

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The diagram shows a cross-section of a leaf. Which type of cell controls the entry of carbon dioxide into the leaf? A B C D

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The table shows vitamins that should be included in a balanced diet. Which row shows the correct use in the body and food source for one of these vitamins? vitamin use in body food source
options: C strengthens bones and teeth sugar
C resistance to disease fish oil
D strengthens bones and teeth fish oil

questions.question: Which substance is an ion that is used to make chlorophyll?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What is the function of the gall bladder?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The diagram shows the different types of teeth found in the upper jaw of a human. They are in the same order as they are found in the jaw. Which type of tooth is circled?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: A person ate food X. Chemical digestion of food X occurred in the mouth and small intestine but not in the stomach. What was in food X? A fat B ions C protein D starch

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What is present in a vascular bundle?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What is the pathway taken by water from the soil to the leaf?
options: root hair cells → root cortex → mesophyll → xylem
root hair cells → root cortex → xylem → mesophyll
root cortex→ root hair cells → mesophyll → xylem
root cortex → root hair cells→ xylem → mesophyll

options: oxygen + water → carbon dioxide + glucose [Turn over 12

questions.question: The diagram shows an iris and a pupil in different light conditions. iris pupil light dark Which characteristic of living organisms is this an example of?

questions.question: Where is insulin secreted, and what is its effect on blood glucose concentration? effect on blood secreted by glucose concentration

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The graph shows the number of cases of MRSA in one country between 2001 and 2006. 7500 number of 7000 cases of MRSA 6500 6000 2001 2002 2003 2004 2005 2006 year Between which years was the greatest change in the number of cases of MRSA?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Which row describes an insect-pollinated flower? anther pollen grain stigma
options: inside flower large and sticky inside flower
outside flower large and sticky inside flower
inside flower small and light outside flower
outside flower small and light outside flower

questions.question: What is a use of yeast in biotechnology?
options: anaerobic respiration to make human proteins

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Many mammals have coloured fur and many birds have coloured feathers. Which uses of colour could help males survive long enough to pass on their features to their offspring? hiding from hiding from warning animals animals which animals which that they are might eat them they could eat poisonous A ✓ ✓ ✓ key B ✓ ✓ ✗ ✓ = yes C ✗ ✓ ✗ ✗ = no D ✓ ✗ ✓ [Turn over 16

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The list shows statements about selection. 1 Individuals reproduce and pass on their alleles to the next generation. 2 Genetic variation exists between individuals and many offspring are produced. 3 Individuals struggle for survival and compete for resources. 4 Individuals that are better adapted to the environment survive. 5 Individuals with desirable features are selected by humans. Which statements are correct descriptions of natural selection?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: Some of the processes involved in the carbon cycle are listed. 1 combustion 2 decomposition 3 photosynthesis 4 respiration During the carbon cycle, which processes release carbon dioxide into the atmosphere?

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: What are the effects of sewage pollution on the biodiversity and the number of bacteria in a river? biodiversity numberofbacteria

questions.subject: igcse_biology
questions.question: The increase of which gases contributes to an enhanced greenhouse effect?
